calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-13-2015 Off Calendar

Defendant Nicholas Behunins Notice Of Motion And Special Motion To Strike Strategic Lawsuit Against Public Participation
Off Calendar Feb-24-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT NICHOLAS BEHUNIN'S Special Motion To Strike Strategic Lawsuit Against Public Participation is taken Off calendar. This action was transferred to Los Angeles County pursuant to the Order dated January 30, 2014. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-13-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS LEONARD STEINER AND STEINER & LIBO, P.C.'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is taken off calendar. This action was transferred to Los Angeles County pursuant to Order dated January 30, 2014. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)

MOTION TO TRANSFER
Off Calendar Jan-30-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. CHRISTINA VANDER WERF of Gordon & Rees, LLP, Tel No. (213) 270-7856 appearing telephonically for Defendants Leonard Steiner, and Steiner & Libo, P.C.;
Atty. REGINA ASHKINADZE of Elkin Gamboa & Ashkinadze, LLP, Tel No. (323) 372-1202 appearing for Defendant Nicholas Behunin;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - Matter was not argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS LEONARD STEINER AND STEINER & LIBO, P.C.'S MOTION TO TRANSFER is granted. No opposition filed. This action is transferred to Los Angeles County. Plaintiff to pay all transfer costs. No attorneys fees are awarded to Defendant because Defendant does not show that it reasonably made an offer to stipulate to change of venue. (See CCP sec. 396b(b).) ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

Notice Of Joinder And Joinder To Motion To Transfer Venue To Los Angeles Superior Court Filed By Defendant Leonard Steiner And Steiner & Libo P.C.
Off Calendar Jan-30-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. CHRISTINA VANDER WERF of Gordon & Rees, LLP, Tel No. (213) 270-7856 appearing telephonically for Defendants Leonard Steiner, and Steiner & Libo, P.C.;
Atty. REGINA ASHKINADZE of Elkin Gamboa & Ashkinadze, LLP, Tel No. (323) 372-1202 appearing for Defendant Nicholas Behunin;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - Matter was not argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT NICHOLAS BEHUNIN'S Joinder To Motion To Transfer Venue To Los Angeles Superior Court Filed By Defendant Leonard Steiner And Steiner & Libo P.C. is granted. No opposition filed. This action is transferred to Los Angeles County. Plaintiff to pay all transfer costs. No attorneys fees are awarded to Defendant because Defendant does not show that it reasonably made an offer to stipulate to change of venue. (See CCP sec. 396b(b).) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
